zh.lifeSummary: 當Benedicta De Denne於大約1306年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞加頓時，她的父親Sir William Denne29歲，母親Elizabeth de Gatton18歲。她與John Shelving結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1376年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benedicta De Denne于大约1306年出生在英国英格兰素瑞加頓时，她的父亲Sir William Denne29岁，母亲Elizabeth de Gatton18岁。她与John Shelving结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1376年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾維爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Denne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (mainly northern) and Walloon: probably a variant of Dhenne, a patronymic, with fused preposition d(e) ‘of’, from Henne, a pet form of the personal names French Henri, Flemish Hendrik (see Henry 1). Alternatively, perhaps a variant of Daine, the feminine form of Dain .

variants.name: Denn
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Denne , a habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in Kent and Sussex with names derived from Middle English den ‘woodland swine-pasture’ (Old English denn), such as Denne Manor in Chilham, Denne Hill in Kingston, and Denne Court in Woodnesborough (Kent); Denne Park in Horsham, Denne in Warnham, and Dann's Farm in Willingdon (Sussex).
English: possibly from a pet form of   Denis  .

nameMeanings.name: Benedicta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Benedicte
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Benedicta De Denne was born about 1306, in Gatton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Denne, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth de Gatton, was 18. She married John Shelving. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1376, in Well, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benedicta De Denne est née environ 1306, à Gatton, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Denne, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Gatton, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John Shelving. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1376, à Well, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benedicta De Denne um 1306 in Gatton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Denne 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Gatton 18. Sie hat John Shelving geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1376 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Well, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benedicta De Denne è nata il circa 1306 nel Gatton, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Denne, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Gatton, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato John Shelving. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1376, nel Well, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Benedicta De Denneが約1306年にイギリスイギリススリーガットオンで生まれた時，父Sir William Denneは29歳，母Elizabeth de Gattonは18歳であった。John Shelvingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1376年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウエルで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Benedicta De Denne(이)가 대략 1306년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 가턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Denne(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Gatton(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 John Shelving(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 웰에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benedicta De Denne nasceu aproximadamente 1306, em Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Denne, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Gatton, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John Shelving. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1376, em Well, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benedicta De Denne родилась около 1306 г. в местности гаттон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Denne было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Gatton, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Shelving. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1376 г. в местности велл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benedicta De Denne nació aproximadamente 1306, en Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Denne, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Gatton, tenía 18 años. Se casó con John Shelving. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1376, en Well, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
